subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Give thanks unto God that thou art among the leaves of the divine Lote-Tree of Paradise and numbered among the handmaidens of the Lord, thy Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که از ورقات سدره فردوسی و از اماء حضرت مقصود تاجی
